title: IGNTU Amarkantak
text_content: IGNTU Amarkantak IGNTU Amarkantak : 26 January 2026 IGNTU: 25 June 2025 Science Day 2025 Science Day 2025 Previous Next Flash News: Provisional Selection List- Second Open Counselling UG/PG-Admission 2025-26 Click Here for Details Notice Regarding adopting of MOOC-SWAYAM Courses Click Here for Details || CUET (PG)/B.Ed. Admission 2025 Click Here for Details Visitor Vice-Chancellor Smt. Droupadi Murmu The Hon'ble President of India and Visitor Smt. Droupadi Murmu assumed office as the 15th President of India on July 25, 2022. Read More Prof. Byomakesh Tripathy Hon'ble Vice-Chancellor (I/c) Read More Important Links Admission Central Library Hostels IQAC Photo Gallery Recruitment Scholarship Seminar Tender The University Amarkantak Students Corner About University: The University came into existence by the Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Act, 2007 and came into action on July 2008. The jurisdiction of the University extends to the whole country and it is fully funded by the Central Government through the University Grant Commission. The university caters to the tribal's long cherished dream of higher education. Read More About Amarkantak: Amarkantak is one of the best tourist and religious place of Madhya Pradesh.Amarkantak is situated in Madhya Pradesh in India. Amarkantak is located at 22.67Ã‚Â°N 81.75Ã‚Â°E. It has an average elevation of 1048 metres (3438 ft). As well as the Narmada, the Son River, initially referred to as Jwalawanti of Johila, the Narmada and the Amadoh, which is a major early tributary of the Godavari, all rise from the Amarkantak plateau. View/Download 02 February 2026 Hostel Notice for Students सभी शोधार्थियों को सूचित किया जाता है कि सोन शोध छात्रावास में सत्र 2026 हेतु Batch 2025 के शोधार्थियों के लिए छात्रावास प्रवेश के संबंध में अंतिम तिथि 02 फरवरी 2026 निर्धारित है, इसे विस्तारित करते हुए 05 फरवरी 2026 को शाम 5 बजे तक निर्धारित किया जाता है। निर्धारित तिथि के पश्चात प्राप्त आवेदनों पर किसी भी स्थिति में विचार नहीं किया जाएगा। 24 January 2026 Notice for Students: Call for Allotment at Sone Research Hostel for January 2026 Applications are invited from PhD scholars (2025 Admission, Boys) admitted to IGNTU for Sone RESEARCH hostel allotment. The last date for submission of the application is 2nd February 2026. Scholars may submit their applications using the link provided below. Click Here to Apply using Google Form Link 23 January 2026 सूचना: MPTAAS पोर्टल पर छात्रों के लिए OTR प्रक्रिया संपन्न करने के लिए प्रारूप सूचना के अनुमोदन सूचना: MPTAAS पोर्टल पर छात्रों के लिए OTR प्रक्रिया संपन्न करने के लिए प्रारूप सूचना के अनुमोदन View/Download 22 January 2026 Notice: University Badminton Enrollment for Students and Employees of IGNTU (One-Time Registration) The University invites eligible students and employees of IGNTU to enrol on the badminton facilities through a one-time registration process. Interested participants must complete the online enrolment form, fulfil the prescribed eligibility, equipment, and fitness requirements, and pay the applicable registration fee. Approved participants will be issued a Badminton ID Card for access to the badminton courts. Interested students must fill out the Badminton Enrollment Form online via this link. Interested staff members must fill out the Badminton Enrollment Form online via this link. Interested applicants must fill out the Badminton Enrollment Form online via this link. IGNTU, Amarkantak invited applications from eligible candidates for the post of Chair Professor (01) and Doctoral fellow (01) under Dr. Ambedkar Chair at Indira Gandhi National Tribal University, Amarkantak, Madhya Pradesh.
